pages.text: Every cache rolls its rarity before revealing loot. Rarity controls which pool it draws from — higher rarity means better items at your current tier.$(br2)Default odds out of 10,000 rolls:

pages.title: Rarity Odds
pages.text: $(li)$(gray)Common$() — 79.00%$(br)$(li)$(aqua)Uncommon$() — 15.00%$(br)$(li)$(blue)Rare$() — 4.70%$(br)$(li)$(dark_purple)Epic$() — 0.90%$(br)$(li)$(gold)Legendary$() — 0.30%$(br)$(li)$(red)Mythic$() — 0.10%$(br2)Server admins can tune these weights in the config file.
